scope_note: Columbia’s official admissions pages were bot-protected in this environment, so this panel stays strictly limited to what the accessible Common App school profile explicitly shows.
policy: Cross-verified from the accessible Common App school profile: Columbia is listed as test optional/flexible for first-year applicants and accepts self-reported test scores.

claims.claim: The Common App school profile labels Columbia as Test Optional/Flexible for first-year applicants.
The Common App school profile says Columbia accepts self-reported test scores for first-year applicants.
